error_signature: unable to connect to LinkedIn in cloud version
title: LinkedIn connection issue in cloud version
symptom: Users are unable to connect to LinkedIn using the cloud version of n8n, while it works fine on the desktop version.
applies_when: Attempting to connect via cloud version
root_cause: The LinkedIn node in the cloud version requires specific settings that differ from the desktop version. Notably, the 'Organization Support' option must be disabled, and the 'openid' scope is necessary for successful authentication.
fix_steps: Open the LinkedIn node settings in the cloud version
Ensure the 'openid' scope is included in the credentials
Save the changes and attempt to connect again
agent_instruction: Disable 'Organization Support' in the LinkedIn node settings and ensure 'openid' scope is included.
